notes: Populated by C-S1A-003 (tests/detect_impact.rs) against the real GraphProjection/compute_impact output over a bootstrapped 2-commit fixture repo. main() in src/main.rs is the sole caller of call_a (via the qualified a::call_a()) and is itself the fn-main entry point, so it lands at hop 1 with risk promoted to critical per contracts/detect-impact.md's entry_point rule. blast_radius entries carry only {symbol,hop,risk} (bare symbol name, no path) per the frozen contract's Output shape — this superseded an earlier draft of this file that used core/hop1/high, written before compute_impact existed; core has no callers of its own reachable from call_a's change, so it never enters the blast radius.
